calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Set For Trial On May-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenyon Harbison, Esq. (213-622-5555) appearing by court call for One West Bank, defendant and moving party / Marc D. Bender, Esq. (650-353-4503) for Una Bailey, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court announces its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED IN PART and OVERRULED IN PART. Sustained as to 1st, 4th and 5th causes of action without leave to amend; Overruled as to 2nd cause of action for promissory estoppel based on economic damages; Sustained due to cost of appraisal; Sustained as to 3rd cause of action with leave to amend to allege actionable breach of covenant not based on statutory violations.

Arguments are heard by Court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED IN PART and OVERRULED IN PART. Sustained as to 1st, 4th and 5th causes of action without leave to amend; Overruled as to 2nd cause of action for promissory estoppel based on economic damages; Sustained due to cost of appraisal; Sustained as to 3rd cause of action with leave to amend to allege actionable breach of covenant not based on statutory violations. Defendant's counsel to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenyon Harbison, Esq. (213-622-5555) appearing by court call for One West Bank, defendant and moving party / Marc D. Bender, Esq. (650-353-4503) for Una Bailey, plaintiff and opposing party

Court announces its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS ONE WEST, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY' s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $1,898.50 is GRANTED.

Arguments are heard by Court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS ONE WEST, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY' s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $1,898.50 is GRANTED. Defendant's counsel to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KENYON HARBISON, ESQ., 213.622.5555, FOR DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ONE WEST BANK, FSB (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS ONE WEST, ETC.) & DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on April 29, 2013. Moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the operative pleading to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
